# Motif

> Public SDK, CLI, and MCP server for fal.ai image, video, editing, and utility endpoints, built for agent-readable dry runs, schema introspection, and local automation.

## Start Here

- [README](./README.md) - User-facing overview, install commands, model registry, CLI examples, and options reference.
- [Agent instructions](./AGENTS.md) - Cross-tool commands, package map, permission boundaries, and verification expectations.
- [Security notes](./docs/security.md) - FAL_KEY handling, MCP trust boundary, local history exposure, and ephemeral generation limits.
- [Surface scorecard](./docs/surface/scorecard.md) - Current agent-readiness score and dimension summary.

## Packages

- [CLI package](./apps/cli) - `@howells/motif-cli`, the `motif` binary, terminal Studio, CLI tests, and package-specific agent guide.
- [SDK package](./packages/motif-sdk) - `@howells/motif-sdk`, model metadata, fal request normalization, SDK types, and mocked fetch tests.
- [MCP package](./packages/motif-mcp) - `@howells/motif-mcp`, stdio MCP tools, read-only resources, and InMemoryTransport tests.

## Agent Interfaces

- [CLI describe command](./apps/cli/src/commands/describe.ts) - Runtime schema for commands, models, tools, leaderboards, errors, and enums.
- [CLI structured output](./apps/cli/src/utils/output.ts) - JSON, NDJSON, field masks, and structured error emission.
- [CLI input hardening](./apps/cli/src/utils/input.ts) - Prompt sanitization, path sandboxing, and option validation.
- Series discovery: use `motif --describe series --format json`; `motif series run "theme" --count n --dry-run --format json` plans cohesive themed image sets before spending credits.
- Creative direction: `generate` and `vary` accept eight prompt-enrichment fields (`recipe`, `shot`, `lighting`, `genre`, `camera`, `color`, `material`, `motion`) via CLI flags or a `creative` object; discover current option ids with `motif --describe --format json`.
- [MCP server](./packages/motif-mcp/src/create-server.ts) - Tool and resource definitions for MCP clients.
- [SDK server](./packages/motif-sdk/src/server.ts) - Result-returning fal client, queue polling, upload support, and payload deletion.

## Tests

- [CLI contract tests](./apps/cli/tests/cli-contract.test.ts) - Help, dry-run, stdin JSON, structured errors, tool commands, and fal body previews.
- [SDK request tests](./packages/motif-sdk/tests/server-fetch.test.ts) - Mocked fal fetch behavior, no-store headers, and request payload deletion.
- [MCP tests](./packages/motif-mcp/tests/tools.test.ts) - MCP client/server protocol tests using InMemoryTransport.
- [CI workflow](./.github/workflows/ci.yml) - Typecheck, lint, and tests on push and pull request.
